finding_results.notes: Replaced thesis-forward argument beats with materially specific accusations tied to the leaking thermos, fridge credit notice, wet co-op envelope, school pickup knowledge, and Leela's dawn routine while preserving Nita's refusal to be rendered interchangeable.
